author: Muhammad Yahya Azeem
content: Just pushed major updates to the ShadPS5 GPU translation layer! Working on self loaders and instruction mappings. Exciting progress in low-level console emulation. Details on my GitHub.

author: Muhammad Yahya Azeem
content: Rooted Cobblestone on Hack The Box! Insane difficulty machine with some very creative bypass mechanisms. Wrote a detailed exploit walkthrough for systems developers mapping kernel vulnerabilities. HTB verification profile updated.

author: Muhammad Yahya Azeem
content: Deep learning optimizers are highly vulnerable to floating-point parameter drift. Project Golf Ball aims to secure LLM parameter layers from active gradient hijacking attacks. Check my latest R&D repo.
